_note: UPCOMING public hearings only — hand-maintained. Source: the 'Upcoming Public Hearings' table at https://www.princegeorge.ca/city-hall/mayor-council/meetings-agendas-minutes (notices published ~5 days ahead, also on the City's Facebook and the City Hall bulletin board). Past hearings are derived automatically from votes.json, not listed here. When the City lists none, leave `upcoming` empty — the page shows a friendly 'none scheduled' state.

upcoming.title: Rezoning at 1234 Example Street
upcoming.plain: A developer wants to change the rules on this lot so they can build a 4-storey apartment instead of single houses. If you live nearby, this affects traffic, parking, and what gets built next to you.
upcoming.location: Council Chambers, 2nd Floor, City Hall, 1100 Patricia Blvd
upcoming.commentDeadline: 12:00 p.m. on the day of the hearing
